p0.title: Normalize mobile control hit areas to >=44px
acceptance: menu/search/account/cart controls are at least 44x44 at 320/360/390/430

p0.title: Unify JS mobile threshold to <1024 to match CSS contract
acceptance: menu/search/cart first-open/second-open and reopen are consistent at 390/430 and 1024 parity

p1.title: Move promo height and shrink initialization to critical phase
acceptance: sticky top offset is correct on first paint with promo
scroll shrink engages deterministically on first interaction

p1.title: Make cart trigger geometry consistent with other action buttons
acceptance: cart trigger has the same visual box and baseline as adjacent controls on mobile

p1.title: Keep cart badge visible on mobile with compact sizing
acceptance: cart quantity remains visible on <=600 without overflow

p1.title: Lock icon size and action gap rhythm across mobile breakpoints
acceptance: icon size stays consistent, spacing looks even at 320/360/390/430

do_not_do: No snapshot baseline update as proof of product fix
No scope expansion outside mobile core in this cycle
